{{CargoRelic
|name=Glory Stone
|class_id=20723
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Before travelers arrived, certain protomons had possessed extraordinary Glory. However, due to changing environments, these creatures have vanished, leaving only these stone tablets with records about them...
|fame=15
|art=14
|fth=31
|civ=17
|tech=13
|ss1=For each Divine Form obtained, get 30 Form Emblem(s)
|ss2=For each Divine Form obtained, get 40 Form Emblem(s)
|ss3=For each Divine Form obtained, get 50 Form Emblem(s)
|ss4=For each Divine Form obtained, get 50 Form Emblem(s)
|ss7=For each Divine Form obtained, get 50 Form Emblem(s)<br> (Awakened)
}}
